en.extract:
The bristle-crowned starling (Onychognathus salvadorii) is a species of starling in the family Sturnidae. It is found in Ethiopia, Kenya, Somalia, and Uganda.

The '''bristle-crowned starling''' ('''''Onychognathus salvadorii''''') is a species of [[starling]] in the family [[Sturnidae]]. It is found in [[Ethiopia]], [[Kenya]], [[Somalia]], and [[Uganda]].
